title: Change request opened for Confluence access
snippet: A change request was initiated to provide new developer access to Confluence. Linked to Jira ONB-123 for onboarding workflow.

title: Unable to access Jira API
snippet: Integration job failed with 401 while calling Jira API. Manual triage required by support engineer.

title: Routine change logged for Atlassian JSM
snippet: Change log indicates configuration update in Atlassian JSM. Reviewed by platform team for compliance.

title: Onboarding handoff: access requests
snippet: Thread shows repeated handoffs for access approvals. People ask where the SOP is and who approves Confluence access.

title: Runbook: onboarding checklist
snippet: Runbook describes onboarding checklist steps but is outdated; references old Jira project keys and missing owners.
